claim_card.claim: AI intuition should be framed as gradient-based coherence support, not domination: its legitimate role is to detect destructive gradients, reduce avoidable coercion, and preserve viable coordination without enforcing uniformity.
claim_card.test_hook: Evaluate deployed systems by whether they reduce coercive peer dynamics and improve coordination resilience without increasing centralized control.

source.locator: p1 Abstract; p5–6 Section IV; p7 Thesis 4
